# Slough App

> Slough App is a community app built for the town of Slough, UK. It connects locals through a feed, marketplace, jobs board, and groups. The app is in pre-launch — currently recruiting alpha testers ahead of a public release on iOS and Android.

Slough App is made by locals, for locals. The site at https://www.slough.app is a marketing and signup site; the app itself is mobile-only and is launching on the Apple App Store and Google Play.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.slough.app/): Overview of Slough App and email signup to be notified at launch.
- [Get the App](https://www.slough.app/get-slough-app/): Pre-launch landing page where users can register to be notified when the app goes live on iOS and Android.
- [Become a Tester](https://www.slough.app/become-a-tester/): Alpha tester signup. Testers get early access, a direct feedback channel to the team, and a contributor credit at launch.
- [Launch Party / Get Notified](https://www.slough.app/launch-party/): Email signup form for launch-day notifications.
- [Contact](https://www.slough.app/contact/): Support and contact options. General support: support@slough.app.

## Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.slough.app/privacy/): How Slough App handles user data.
- [Terms of Service & EULA](https://www.slough.app/terms/): Terms of use for the app and website.
- [Child Safety Standards](https://www.slough.app/child-safety/): Slough App's standards against child sexual abuse and exploitation (CSAE), in line with Apple and Google requirements.

## About

- Audience: Residents of Slough, Berkshire, UK and surrounding areas.
- Platforms: iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play).
- Status: Pre-launch, alpha testing.
- Core features: Local feed, marketplace, jobs board, groups, messaging.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://www.slough.app/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap of indexable pages.
- [Robots](https://www.slough.app/robots.txt): Crawler rules.
